should_trigger.prompt: Use /clarify to grill this vague PrismSpec change before writing the spec.
Before drafting spec.md, ask me one engineering boundary question at a time and recommend defaults.
This request may affect commands, lint, and workflow state; clarify the boundary before the spec.

should_not_trigger.prompt: The spec is approved; convert it into an AC-traced plan.md.
Execute the next planned implementation task with TDD evidence.
Run the verification pipeline and write verify.md.

assertions: Asks exactly one material question at a time.
Provides a recommended answer with each question.
Inspects repo-observable facts before asking the user.
Records clarified boundaries in spec.md rather than a default grill.md artifact.
